items.title: [正面] Mortimens is eating my free time alive (in the bes...
items.summary:
Mortimens is eating my free time alive (in the best way possible)

I’ve only just started playing, but I’ve already clocked 20+ hours without even realizing it, and I’m completely hooked. If you like roguelike deckbuilders, card games, or gacha mechanics, this game somehow smashes them all together AND throws in horror vibes that make it feel totally unique.

The runs are super addicting—I've never lost so far but if I would lose, I would probably or instantly want to start another one because there are so many different ways to build and experiment. The characters and their card variety are great, and it always feels like there’s some new synergy to discover. It nails that “just one more try” loop perfectly.

Now let’s talk about the gacha: this has to be the most generous gacha game I’ve ever touched. No joke, I’ve had so many pulls that I’ve managed to grab almost all the characters I wanted already. It actually feels rewarding to play instead of stingy, which is so rare in gacha-style games. It keeps me excited to log in and see what I’ll get next.

And the horror atmosphere? Chef’s kiss. The characters are creepy in all the right ways, with just enough unsettling charm that you actually want to meet them all. The setting and vibe give the game so much personality—like a spooky storybook mixed with a nightmare carnival.

Overall: Mortimens is dark, stylish, generous, and dangerously addicting. If you’re into deckbuilders or roguelikes and want something with a horror twist that actually rewards your time, I can’t recommend this enough.

10/10 would let Mortimens consume 200 hours+ of my life.

items.title: [正面] EDIT: As of editing this review (27.10.2025), I ga...
items.summary:
EDIT: As of editing this review (27.10.2025), I gained the news that the entire first Arc of this phenomenal story has been human-written and proofread! I encourage now as any time than ever to jump into this unique experience!
The gameplay loop truly learnt from what made its inspiration (Slay the Spire) great and wove it together with its amazing atmosphere.
The character's don't feel like an advertisement to go gamble your savings away, but an actual person with their history and footnote to this(these) expansive world(s).
Please support this passion project in any amounts you can.
The Devteam truly made a passionproject that they will ride or die on.
I rather wish this game its fulldeserved success.

heres the original short piece as reference:
What a strong first chapter.
If they resolve the critique of abolishing all Machine Translation off the game I would wholeheartedly recommend this.

items.title: [负面] Events scale with your account level and training ...
items.summary: Events scale with your account level and training your characters past 60 takes EONS. Game is just punishing you the longer you play which is insanely lame. Please at least make normal playable and keep difficulty to hard and madness.

items.title: [负面] Everything now is horrific gacha. Compared to Gens...

Everything now is horrific gacha. Compared to Genshin, Honkai, Wuthering, etc, this one at least has interesting gameplay. Still never worth actually grinding and certainly not worth paying.

6/10
